description: Manage EmailOctopus lists, contacts, campaigns, automations, reports, and cross-list cleanup workflows from the terminal.

novel_features.name: Per-contact engagement scorecard
novel_features.description: Score every contact by opens, clicks, and inactive-since across all campaigns. The API has no engagement-history endpoint; we synthesize it locally.

novel_features.name: Cross-list duplicate finder
novel_features.description: Find contacts that appear on multiple lists in the account, optionally consolidating them onto one canonical list.

novel_features.name: Campaign performance digest
novel_features.description: One-shot campaign report combining summary, top-N links, contact-level breakdown, and per-domain opens — rendered for terminal or Markdown paste.

novel_features.name: List churn diff
novel_features.description: Show contacts touched in this list since a relative time. Surfaces the change-set the API can't return — useful for incremental syncs, audit logs, or alerting on recent activity.

novel_features.name: Tag set-algebra query
novel_features.description: Find contacts matching boolean combinations of tags: --has trial-started --not activated returns the trial cohort that hasn't converted.

novel_features.name: CSV upsert with mapping
novel_features.description: Push a CSV into EmailOctopus with mapped fields and tags. Dry-runs the diff against the local store first, then chunks into batch-upsert calls paced under the rate limit.

novel_features.name: Rate-budgeted bulk delete
novel_features.description: Delete many contacts matching a local predicate, paced under the 10/sec API limit with a resumable progress file.

novel_features.name: Bulk automation trigger
novel_features.description: Queue an automation for many contacts from stdin or CSV, paced under the rate limit with retry on 429.
